en.title: Drop into ZGW, Valtimo, or bespoke stacks without touching workflows.
en.description: Epistola exposes a narrow surface: JSON in, PDF/DOCX/HTML out. Multi-tenant auth via Keycloak, Helm charts, and health probes make it feel like any other platform service in your cluster.

steps.title: Submit payload
steps.description: Orchestrator sends signed JSON + tenant slug and registers a render batch.

stages.label: Orchestrator
stages.detail: Emit signed JSON + tenant slug; webhooks register batch IDs.

stages.label: Validation
stages.detail: Verify schema version, tenant access, and required fields.

stages.label: Queue
stages.detail: Assign job ID and enqueue render on the tenant pool.

steps.title: Render job
steps.description: Epistola resolves schema, selects template version, and renders output.

stages.label: Template
stages.detail: Resolve schema, pick active version, and lock template assets.

stages.label: Renderer
stages.detail: Render with audit logging and checksum hashing.

stages.label: Artifacts
stages.detail: Persist PDF/DOCX/HTML outputs and register storage refs.

steps.title: Deliver outputs
steps.description: Webhooks and storage callbacks provide URLs, metadata, and audit refs.

stages.label: Callbacks
stages.detail: Send webhook with URLs, metadata, and audit references.

stages.label: Storage
stages.detail: Write outputs to tenant storage adapters and retain logs.

stages.label: Archive
stages.detail: Seal job metadata and surface history to orchestrators.

nl.title: Integreer in ZGW, Valtimo, of maatwerk stacks zonder workflows aan te passen.
nl.description: Epistola exposeert een smal oppervlak: JSON in, PDF/DOCX/HTML uit. Multi-tenant auth via Keycloak, Helm charts, en health probes maken het aanvoelen als elke andere platform service in je cluster.

steps.title: Verstuur payload
steps.description: Orchestrator stuurt signed JSON + tenant slug en registreert een render batch.

stages.label: Orchestrator
stages.detail: Emit signed JSON + tenant slug; webhooks registeren batch IDs.

stages.label: Validatie
stages.detail: Verifieer schema versie, tenant toegang, en verplichte velden.

stages.label: Wachtrij
stages.detail: Wijs job ID toe en plaats render in de tenant pool.

steps.title: Render job
steps.description: Epistola resolved schema, selecteert template versie, en rendert output.

stages.label: Template
stages.detail: Resolve schema, kies actieve versie, en lock template assets.

stages.label: Renderer
stages.detail: Render met audit logging en checksum hashing.

stages.label: Artifacts
stages.detail: Persisteer PDF/DOCX/HTML outputs en registreer storage refs.

steps.title: Lever outputs
steps.description: Webhooks en storage callbacks bieden URLs, metadata, en audit refs.

stages.label: Callbacks
stages.detail: Stuur webhook met URLs, metadata, en audit references.

stages.label: Storage
stages.detail: Schrijf outputs naar tenant storage adapters en bewaar logs.

stages.label: Archief
stages.detail: Seal job metadata en toon geschiedenis aan orchestrators.
